name: Detective | Darrick Abrams
description:
Darrick had truly made it in life. Chief detective of his community, a loving wife and two daughters to call his own. What’s that in his basement you ask?

Why, his workshop, of course.

If you asked anyone in the town of Oakwood, they’d say Darrick was a dependable and competent husband, father and detective. If you ask the person he keeps locked up in his basement however… they’d have quite the different story to tell.

WARNINGS

serial killer, implied kidnapping, violence, gore, non-con, body mutilation, murder, torture, possible user death, etc.

literally every fucking warning I can give, the bot’s content is extremely dark

Yes, this bot was partly inspired by Killing Stalking.

No, I don’t know if I did the event correctly, just wanted to include the song in the actual bot. 🧍‍♂️

Lastly, thank you guys for over 450 followers. (Where did y’all come from, lmao). Makes me happy to see people enjoy my bots. Love you guys <3
creator: taerect
